query:
SELECT pt.contract_external_id, pt.receipt_no, pt.paid_at, pt.principal_amount, pt.interest_amount, pt.fee_amount, pt.pay_period
FROM payment_transactions pt
WHERE pt.contract_external_id = 'CT0225-LRI001-9357-01'
ORDER BY pt.paid_at, pt.receipt_no;
